title: senecio cylindrocephalus
intro: Senecio cylindrocephalus is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, also known as Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a bitter tonic and having anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio cylindrocephalus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Senecio cylindrocephalus can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat a range of health conditions.
